data.title: Nintendo Gets Profit Boost From Strong Switch 2 Sales
data.description:
By Kosaku Narioka 




  Nintendo's net profit jumped in the first quarter, topping market expectations, driven in part by strong sales of its new Switch 2 console. 



  The Japanese videogame maker said Friday that net profit rose 19% from a year earlier to 96.03 billion yen, equivalent to $636.9 million, for the three months ended June. That beat the estimate of Y64.7 billion in a poll of analysts by data provider Visible Alpha. 



  First-quarter revenue more than doubled to Y572.36 billion as Nintendo sold 5.8 million Switch 2 consoles. The company maintained its sales forecast for the new device at 15.0 million units for the fiscal year that began in April. 



  Nintendo started selling the successor to the Switch, one of the best-selling consoles of all time, on June 5. 



  The Switch 2 features a larger, more responsive screen with more powerful processing and graphics performance and allows players to chat or share their game screen with friends online. 



  The original Switch was a runaway success for Nintendo following its launch in 2017. A pandemic-driven boom in gaming amplified the popularity of the console, but sales of the aging device eventually declined. 



  Nintendo has been diversifying its revenue streams with some success, offering different forms of entertainment by leveraging its popular characters and game titles. 



  Nintendo plans to produce new films based on the "Super Mario" and "The Legend of Zelda" game series, looking to build on previous box-office success. 





  Write to Kosaku Narioka at kosaku.narioka@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  August 01, 2025 03:17 ET (07:17 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Dr. Shaun Gregory Morgan & Associates Successfully Represented in DIAC Arbitration for $113M Award
data.description:
New York, Aug. 01, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Franklin Morgan & Associates is proud to announce that in a recent ruling, the Dubai International Arbitration Centre (DIAC) has awarded the firm $113 million in a cross-border commercial dispute. The case created a big stir in the legal community not only because of the scope of the dispute, but also for how it positioned Dubai to the world as a high-value destination for international arbitration.


The arbitration was led by Dr. Shaun Gregory Morgan, a professional with expertise in both legal and financial sectors and decades of experience across various jurisdictions. Although all information about the case and the tribunal decision are protected under DIAC protocol, insiders have confirmed that multiple regulatory and legal frameworks were involved in the case. The process was long and exhaustive, and the tribunal only reached its conclusion after extended arguments from both parties discussing complex matters such as contract enforcement, commercial liabilities, and cross-jurisdictional compliance.

Why is this arbitration such a big deal?

To understand the importance of this ruling, we first need to understand the stature of the institution offering it. The Dubai International Arbitration Centre, aka DIAC, was established in 1994 for resolving complex conflicts in the commercial space, mainly in the Middle East and broader international markets. Backed by the Dubai government, it is trusted by a major section of multinational corporations, governments, and global investors for neutral, efficient, and enforceable arbitration services. Cases that land at DIAC are often complex, cross-jurisdictional, and high-stakes; both financially and reputation-wise.

So, when the DIAC tribunal presents an award of $113 million for a high-profile case, along with the legal victory, it also signifies an appreciation for the intelligence of strategy, integrity of case-handling, and the ability to manage complex disputes. Indeed, most arbitration decisions stay private, but when large sums are involved, they can highlight wider trends in how international disputes are being handled. Legal experts say the size of the award and the proficiency of the process for the case in question could influence how future cross-border disputes are managed in the Gulf region.

Details of the Case

Although DIAC has overseen several sizable settlements in the past, this particular ruling is amongst the largest in its history, capturing the attention of many. There were extensive contractual arrangements involved in the dispute that the legal team had to go through a number of different regulatory channels to get interpreted. The specifics of the dispute have not been publicly disclosed, in line with DIAC's confidentiality standards. Nevertheless, insider sources have confirmed that it involved multiple claims from several parties, financial transactions across different legal systems across borders, and complicated contracts that required long and detailed arbitration proceedings. The $113 million award reportedly took months of reviewing evidence and back-and-forth legal arguments in front of a panel.

“This was no easy contract dispute. For the regulatory issues alone, it crossed three jurisdictions. We needed to go deep into financial instrumentations and their treatment under international commercial law just to scratch the surface of the matter”, said Dr. Shaun Gregory Morgan, the lead representative for the case. He added that the biggest challenge was aligning the contractual requirements with different local rules and compliance standards.

It is to be noted however that Dr. Morgan and his team’s ability to combine financial expertise with regulatory insight played a key role in shaping the case’s outcome. This also points out how disputes are becoming more interdisciplinary now and, therefore, so are the requirements for their resolutions.

DIAC’s Growing Role in Global Arbitration

Once viewed primarily as a regional forum, the Dubai International Arbitration Centre has increasingly been operating at a much more intercontinental level. The shift is evident not only in terms of the cross-border disputes it administers, but also in the evolving legal frameworks it applies. With ongoing reforms, updated procedural rules, and growing participation from international counsel, DIAC appears to be moving toward a much greater global relevance.

In addition, this $113 million case resolved in the forum now also serves as a benchmark to illustrate the neutrality of the DIAC platform and its enforceability for resolving high-stakes commercial disputes. It is already prompting many businesses, particularly those in Asia, Africa, and the Gulf, to reassess their approach to international contracts. Experts believe that the ruling will influence the structure of all future contracts, especially for companies operating across the region.

The case’s sheer scale, multifaceted nature, and the sizable award have turned it into a huge topic of discussion among all arbitration forums and legal think tanks. So far, no appeals or follow-up proceedings have been reported to be filed. Till now, the award stands uncontested as well. However, legal professionals, investors, and arbitration bodies worldwide are keeping a close watch on the award details and how it may influence subsequent enforcement actions and contract standards across sectors.



Media Details
Name- Franklin Morgan Law P.A
Email- law@franklinmorganlaw.com
Phone- +1-212 202 8535
Website- franklinmorganlaw.com
Address- Level 27, 152 West 57th Street, New York NY 10021

data.title: Atlantica Announces the Acquisition of Statkraft's Renewable Energy Platform in Canada
data.description:
August 1, 2025 – Atlantica Sustainable Infrastructure announced today the acquisition of a Canadian renewable energy platform, which comprises 236 MW in operation and a 0.81 GW pipeline of renewable and storage projects.

The portfolio in operation includes a 51% stake in l’Érable, a 100 MW wind facility in Quebec, which has been in operation since 2013. The asset, with proven operational track record, has a PPA with an investment-grade utility. The acquisition also includes a 136 MW wind asset in Alberta, which began operations in December 2024 and has a PPA with an investment-grade corporate offtaker. The PPAs have an average remaining contract life of 15 years. The completion of the transaction is subject to certain conditions precedent, including the Competition Act approval and other customary regulatory approvals and is expected before the end of 2025.

In addition, the platform brings approximately 0.81 GW of solar, wind, and energy storage projects under development, with sites across several provinces, strengthening Atlantica’s position in Canada.

The integration of an experienced local team as part of the acquisition will complement Atlantica’s existing Canadian operations and support the company’s strategy to capture future growth opportunities across North America.

Santiago Seage, Atlantica’s CEO, said “This acquisition marks a strategic milestone for Atlantica, significantly expanding its presence in a core market with attractive growth prospects through the addition of high-quality operational wind assets and a development pipeline”.

Lazard acted as financial advisor to Atlantica.

About Atlantica

Atlantica Sustainable Infrastructure Ltd. is a sustainable infrastructure company that owns a diversified portfolio of contracted renewable energy, storage, efficient natural gas, electric transmission, and water assets in North America, Europe, and South America (www.atlantica.com).

  


Chief Financial Officer
Leire Perez
E ir@atlantica.com
       		                


1 Considering the equity share in each of the asset the pipeline capacity is 0.6 GW.

data.title: PPX Mining Corp. Amends Second Tranche Payment Terms of Silver Royalty Agreement With Silver Crown Royalties Inc.
data.description:
TORONTO, ON / ACCESS Newswire / August 1, 2025 / PPX Mining Corp. (TSXV:PPX.V)(BVL:PPX)(the "Company" or "PPX") has, together with Silver Crown Royalties Inc. (CBOE:SCRI)(OTCQX:SLCRF)(FRA:QS0) ("SCR"), yesterday amended certain terms of the silver royalty agreement between the Company and SCR originally dated December 13, 2024 (the "Silver Royalty Agreement" and the amendment thereto referred to as the "Amendment").

The second tranche price of the Silver Royalty Agreement in the amount of US$1,470,000, originally payable by SCR to PPX on or before August 6, 2025, has been amended in order to split the payment obligation in two and extend the time by which the total amount of US$1,470,000 must be paid. In connection with these amendments, a total of US$833,000 of the second tranche payment has been paid by SCR to PPX, and the remaining US$637,000 will be payable on or before December 31, 2025. Proceeds will be used by PPX to support its ongoing construction of the CIL and flotation plant at the Company's Igor project, located in La Libertad, Peru (the "Beneficiation Plant").

In connection with the split of the second tranche payment obligations and the partial payment made by SCR, the royalty percentage and total payable ounces to which SCR is entitled under the Silver Royalty Agreement have been increased pro rata by the amount paid (relative to the total amount payable), by 5.1% (to a total of 11.1%), and 76,500 ounces of silver (to an aggregate total of 166,500 ounces of silver), respectively.

Upon payment by SCR to PPX of the remainder of the second tranche price (being US$637,000), the royalty percentage and total payable ounces will increase by an additional 3.9% (to a total of 15%) and 58,500 ounces of silver (to an aggregate total of 225,000 ounces of silver) respectively, as originally contemplated in the Silver Royalty Agreement.

In consideration of the splitting and extension of the second tranche payment, the parties also amended the Silver Royalty Agreement to extend the date by which the minimum silver royalty that SCR is entitled to receive under the Silver Royalty Agreement will commence, from the original date of October 1, 2025, to March 31, 2026 (subject to earlier commencement upon startup of metallurgical operations at the Beneficiation Plant).

Further details regarding the Silver Royalty Agreement can be found in the Company's press releases dated December 16, 2024 and February 6, 2025 announcing closing of the First Tranche. A copy of the Royalty Agreement is available, and a copy of the Royalty Amendment will shortly be available, on the Company's SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca.

About PPX Mining Corp:
PPX Mining Corp. is a Canadian-based mining company with assets in northern Peru. Igor, the Company's 100%-owned flagship gold and silver project, is located in the prolific Northern Peru gold belt in eastern La Libertad Department.

On behalf of the Board of Directors
John Thomas
Chief Executive Officer
82 Richmond Street East
Toronto, Ontario M5C 1P1
Canada
416-361-0737

Neither TSX Venture Exchange nor its Regulation Services Provider (as that term is defined in the policies of the TSX Venture Exchange) accepts responsibility for the adequacy or accuracy of this release.

Cautionary Statement Regarding Forward-Looking Statements:
This press release contains forward-looking information and forward-looking statements (collectively, "forward-looking statements") as such terms are defined by applicable securities laws, including, but not limited to statements regarding the expected closing of the second portion of the second tranche payment, expected use of proceeds to support the Company's construction activities, and future plans. Forward-looking statements are statements that relate to future events. In this context, forward-looking statements often address expected future business plans and financial performance and often contain words such as "anticipate," "believe," "plan," "estimate," "expect," and "intend,", statements that an action or event "may," "might," "could," "should," "would" or "will" be taken or occur, or other similar expressions. Forward-looking statements are subject to a number of known and unknown risks and uncertainties, many of which involve factors or circumstances that are beyond the Company's control, and the Company's actual results could differ materially from those stated or implied in forward-looking statements due to many various factors. Such uncertainties and risks include, among others, delays in closing the second portion of the second tranche payment when anticipated, or at all, as well as risks inherent to production and the Company's construction activities. Although the Company believes that the expectations reflected in the forward-looking statements are reasonable, the Company cannot guarantee that the events and circumstances reflected in the forward-looking statements will be achieved or occur. The timing of events and circumstances and actual results could differ materially from those projected in the forward-looking statements. Accordingly, one should not place undue reliance on forward- looking statements. All forward-looking statements contained in this press release are made as of today's date, and the Company undertakes no obligation to update or publicly revise any forward-looking statements, whether as a result of new information, future events or otherwise, unless required by law.

SOURCE: PPX Mining Corp.

But the most compelling part of Lipovive reviews is the relief. Many users had tried everything, fasting, calorie apps, personal trainers, and still felt stuck. Then they took Lipovive. Day 60+ on Lipovive

Clothing fits better, even if the weight loss isn't dramatic, the shape shift is obvious. Skin appears clearer. Many say their cravings for constant snacking are "just gone." Day 90 and beyond on Lipovive

"I lost 17 pounds in 90 days without giving up my wine or bread. I just wasn't hungry anymore."

Lipovive Benefits for Women Over 35: Hormonal Fat, Cravings, Energy & Insulin

Here's a hard truth: fat loss after 35 isn't just harder, it's hormonal. As estrogen, progesterone, and insulin levels fluctuate, fat begins to cling to different areas (hello lower belly and hips), and cravings seem to take over.

That's why Lipovive was specifically designed with the female hormonal environment in mind.

Here's what the formula supports:

Lipovive'sInsulin Sensitivity
Berberine, Cinnamon Bark, and Apple Cider Vinegar all stabilize blood sugar, which is crucial after 35, when insulin resistance creeps in and promotes belly fat accumulation.

Lipovive'sGLP-1 & GIP Hormonal Balance

Lipovive's Reduced Cravings

>> Most people waste months on trends that never address the root issue. Lipovive gives you 60 days to find out if this is different.

Lipovive's Thermogenesis & Fat Mobilization

Lipovive's Energy Without Stimulants
Unlike caffeine-packed fat burners, Lipovive supports cellular energy production via blood sugar and mitochondrial pathways, so you feel naturally alert and stable, not jittery or wired.

Lipovive's Digestive & Inflammatory Support

Put simply: Lipovive isn't about shrinking you overnight. It's about flipping your metabolic switch back into fat-burning mode, using the same hormonal highways that worked in your 20s.

>>Ready to feel like your metabolism isn't fighting you anymore? Try Lipovive while it's up to 73% off.

Common Lipovive Complaints and Reviews in 2025: Side Effects, Refund Issues & Negative Reviews

While the majority of Lipovive reviews are overwhelmingly positive (Verified), it's important to be transparent, not everyone has the same experience, and no supplement is perfect for everyone.

Here are the most commonly reported complaints in 2025, along with our honest take:

Lipovive: Mild Digestive Discomfort (Days 1-3)
Less than 5% of users report mild bloating or extra bathroom trips. This is likely due to increased bile production and microbiome shifts, especially from ingredients like Berberine and ACV. Most of these symptoms resolve within a couple of days as the body adjusts.

Lipovive: Caffeine Sensitivity
While Lipovive doesn't contain high-dose stimulants, the Green Tea and Ginger Root do have mild thermogenic effects. If you're very caffeine sensitive, you may notice slight restlessness if taken too late in the day. Solution: take it with breakfast.

Lipovive: Fake Bottles Online
Some bad reviews stem from people buying Lipovive from Amazon or 3rd-party sites and receiving knockoff products. Always use the official website to guarantee authenticity and activate the 60-day refund.

Lipovive: Results Not Instant
A handful of negative Lipovive reviews complain that the product "didn't work fast enough." But let's be honest: this isn't Ozempic. It's not a drug. Real metabolic repair takes time, and the formula is designed to support gradual, sustainable change. Users who gave it 30 to 60+ days are the ones reporting real transformations.

Lipovive: Refund Frustration (Rare)
While Lipovive has a generous 60-day policy, a few users mentioned delays in processing refunds. These were resolved once the return tracking number was provided. It's important to follow the official instructions, email, provide return info, and you'll get your refund.

Lipovive BOTTOM LINE:
Lipovive isn't for everyone. But the most common complaints are about timing, expectations, or ordering from sketchy sources. When used properly, and from the official website, Lipovive delivers a rare level of transparency and protection.

>>Try it with full peace of mind. 60-day refund policy means no risk, just give your metabolism time to adjust.

How Lipovive Works: The GLP-1 & GIP Hormone Mimic Strategy Explained

The science behind Lipovive isn't just marketing, it's a real physiological cascade rooted in the most exciting medical findings of the last 5 years. GLP-1 (glucagon-like peptide-1) and GIP (glucose-dependent insulinotropic polypeptide) are two critical metabolic hormones responsible for:

  • Signaling satiety to the brain (so you stop eating)

  • Slowing gastric emptying (so food takes longer to digest and keeps you full)

  • Increasing insulin sensitivity and blood sugar control

  • Enhancing fat breakdown and energy use in the liver and adipose tissue

Prescription drugs like Mounjaro work by stimulating these two hormones pharmacologically. But Lipovive aims to do the same thing naturally, using botanicals and clinically studied extracts like Berberine, Ginger Root, Ginseng, and Resveratrol (Official Source).

Here's how Lipovive's ingredients mimic GLP-1/GIP function:

  • Berberine HCL - Boosts GLP-1 secretion and improves insulin signaling at the cellular level.

  • Apple Cider Vinegar - Increases post-meal satiety by delaying gastric emptying.

  • Ginger Root - Acts as a natural thermogenic while influencing leptin and GLP-1 activity.

  • Resveratrol + Green Tea Extract - Promote brown fat activation and mitochondrial energy use.

What this means is that Lipovive doesn't force your metabolism into crash mode. It reprograms the way your hunger, fullness, fat storage, and glucose response systems communicate. It mimics the hormonal balance you had in your youth, before age, stress, and blood sugar swings rewired your body to hold onto fat.

>>It's not hype. It's hormonal reality. And it's backed by a 60-day full guarantee. Try Lipovive today.

Lipovive Ingredients Breakdown: Green Tea, Berberine, ACV & The Real Metabolic Drivers

The magic behind Lipovive lies not just in its Mounjaro mimicry, but in its smart, synergistic ingredient stack. Here's what each component actually does:

Green Tea Extract - Contains EGCG, a polyphenol that stimulates fat oxidation and thermogenesis, especially in the belly and visceral zones. Green Tea also supports blood sugar regulation and reduces hunger-inducing stress hormones.

Apple Cider Vinegar - Often dismissed as a fad, ACV actually increases satiety hormones like PYY and GLP-1. It also reduces post-meal blood sugar spikes and improves digestive enzyme activity.

Berberine HCL - One of the most powerful natural AMPK activators known. Mimics insulin, lowers blood sugar, reduces fat storage, and increases GLP-1. This is a staple in metabolic health protocols.

Banaba Leaf - A lesser-known herb that contains corosolic acid, shown to regulate glucose uptake and reduce sugar cravings.

Cinnamon Bark - Stabilizes blood sugar, improves insulin sensitivity, and supports thermogenesis. Synergistic with Berberine and ACV for glucose control.

Ginger Root & Ginseng - Support energy levels, digestion, and inflammation control. Ginseng also enhances endurance and mitochondrial efficiency, a key factor in sustained fat burn.

Resveratrol - A potent antioxidant that targets fat accumulation pathways and supports lean muscle preservation during weight loss.

Together, these ingredients don't just burn calories, they reset the hormonal and cellular environment that determines whether your body stores or burns fat.

>>Everything inside Lipovive is there for a reason. Backed by science. Built for results.

Is Lipovive For Weight Loss Safe? Medical Backing, Hormone Risks & Who Should Avoid It

When it comes to hormonal fat-loss supplements, safety is non-negotiable. The popularity of prescription GLP-1 agonists like Mounjaro and Ozempic has sparked legitimate concern: can something like Lipovive, which claims to mimic hormonal effects, really be safe for daily use?

Here's the answer backed by clinical logic, common sense, and functional ingredient data.

Lipovive Is NOT a Drug
Unlike synthetic GLP-1 injections, Lipovive is a plant-based dietary supplement. It doesn't override your endocrine system with exogenous hormones. Instead, it works by naturally encouraging your body's own satiety and metabolic signals, supporting, not hijacking, your biology.

Each Lipovive Ingredient Is Backed by Peer-Reviewed Safety Data
Berberine has decades of clinical research behind it for insulin regulation and cardiovascular support. Green Tea, ACV, Banaba Leaf, and Cinnamon Bark are not only time-tested, they're already consumed globally in food and teas. Lipovive simply concentrates these agents in a bioavailable format.

No Prescription, No Synthetic Interference
Because Lipovive is non-pharmaceutical, there's no risk of GLP-1 overdose, no injection-site reactions, and none of the nausea, vomiting, or pancreatitis risks that plague Mounjaro or Wegovy. That said…

>> If you've tried everything else, why not test the one formula built around real hormonal triggers, with zero risk.

When Should You Avoid Lipovive?
While Lipovive is broadly safe, it may not be ideal for:

  • Pregnant or breastfeeding women.

  • Individuals taking prescription blood sugar medications (unless approved by a doctor).

  • Anyone with severe GI sensitivities to vinegar or ginger.

  • Users expecting stimulant-like effects (Lipovive is non-stimulant by design).

What About Hormone Disruption?
Lipovive is not hormonally active. It supports the natural production and sensitivity to GLP-1 and GIP, but it does not contain hormones or substances that manipulate estrogen, cortisol, or thyroid function.

Bottom line? Lipovive is safe for daily use for most adults, including women over 35, as long as basic contraindications are respected.

>> Lipovive has zero synthetic hormones, and no addictive ingredients, just clean, targeted plant extracts.

Lipovive Price, Official Website Offers & Refund Guarantee (August 2025 Update)

With the surge in natural GLP-1 interest, many buyers are asking the same thing: What does Lipovive cost, and how do I make sure I'm buying the real thing?

Let's address the numbers, the guarantees, and the warnings.

Current Lipovive Pricing (Official Website August 2025):

  • 1 LipoVive Bottle (30-day supply): $49

  • 3 LipoVive Bottles (90-day supply): $117 ($39 per bottle)

  • 6 LipoVive Bottles (180-day supply): $174 ($29 per bottle) - most popular

These prices reflect the latest up to 73% discount being offered exclusively via the official Lipovive website. It is not available in stores.

Free Bonuses & Shipping

  • All multi-bottle orders come with free shipping within the U.S.

  • Some bundles include access to a metabolic meal guide or hormone reset protocol at no extra charge

Refund Policy: 60-Day Money Back Guarantee
Every order of Lipovive is backed by a 100% no-questions-asked, 60-day money-back guarantee. That means you can try Lipovive for a full two months, and if you're not satisfied, you'll receive a full refund with no returns required.

This refund policy signals how confident the creators of Lipovive are in the results. They know true metabolic change takes time, which is why the refund period spans two full cycles of the supplement.

Beware of Fake Lipovive Products

  • Lipovive is not sold on Amazon, eBay, or Walmart.

  • Third-party listings are often fake, expired, or tampered with.

  • Only the official website guarantees access to the latest formulation and refund protection.

Bottom Line? If you're going to test Lipovive's claims, do it right. Get the real product, protect your purchase with the refund guarantee, and start the full 60-day trial.

How to Take Lipovive for Best Results: Dosage, Timing & Mistakes to Avoid

Taking Lipovive the right way can make or break your results. This isn't your typical "pop a pill and hope" fat burner. Because Lipovive mimics GLP-1 metabolic signaling, the timing, consistency, and dosage matter, especially if you're aiming for sustained hormonal and appetite recalibration.

Here's what to know:

Official Lipovive Dosage
Take 2 Lipovive capsules per day, ideally 30 minutes before your first meal. This timing supports pre-meal satiety, blood sugar priming, and fat oxidation initiation. Some users split the dose, 1 in the morning, 1 before dinner, for appetite management throughout the day.

Best Time to Take Lipovive
Morning is ideal. Why? Because GLP-1 levels naturally rise in the first half of the day, and Lipovive supports that rhythm. Taking it early also reduces the chance of nighttime cravings or carb binges.

Mistakes to Avoid with Lipovive:

  • Skipping days disrupts hormonal signaling support. Lipovive works best when taken daily without gaps.

  • Taking it with processed carbs can counteract its effect. Try to pair Lipovive with a protein-rich or balanced meal for amplified metabolic response.

  • Expecting stimulant speed, Lipovive isn't about jittery fat burning. It's about slow, hormonal recalibration that builds results over time.

What to Expect in Your Routine

  • Week 1: Cravings decline, appetite shifts, digestion may briefly adjust

  • Week 2-3: Energy stabilizes, you may notice looser clothes

  • Week 4+: Weight loss momentum builds as GLP-1 pathways recalibrate

Lipovive doesn't ask you to crash diet. But when taken correctly, it supports a biological environment where you simply stop fighting your hunger and storage instincts.
>>Real change doesn't happen overnight, but Lipovive sets your body on the right track, meal by meal.

Lipovive vs Ozempic, Mounjaro & GLP-1 Drugs: Can This Really Compete?

Lipovive is not trying to be Ozempic. But it is targeting the exact same metabolic pathways, and that's what makes it such a compelling alternative for anyone who doesn't want to inject themselves with $1,300+ per month drugs.

Let's break down the differences and similarities:

Mounjaro & Ozempic
These GLP-1 receptor agonists directly bind to the body's hormonal receptors, triggering intense satiety, delayed gastric emptying, and improved insulin response. They are clinically powerful, but often come with:

  • Nausea and vomiting

  • Severe appetite suppression (leading to nutrient deficiency)

  • GI distress

  • Pancreatitis risks

  • Rapid rebound after stopping

Lipovive: The Natural GLP-1 Strategy.

Lipovive does not contain GLP-1 or GIP hormones. Instead, it uses natural ingredients like Berberine, Banaba Leaf, and Apple Cider Vinegar to:

  • Promote your body's own GLP-1 production

  • Enhance insulin sensitivity

  • Support balanced appetite control

  • Trigger thermogenesis and fat oxidation without side effects

It's a biological support system, not a synthetic override.

Cost Comparison

  • Ozempic: ~$1,000/month, prescription-only

  • Lipovive: ~$49/month with up to 73% off offers from the official website

Lipovive Pros

  • No injections

  • No drug interactions

  • 100% natural

  • 60-day refund guarantee

  • Daily hormonal support, not suppression

Lipovive Cons

  • Not as fast or intense as synthetic GLP-1 drugs

  • Requires consistency and patience

Bottom line? Lipovive isn't for someone looking to crash-diet their way to thinness. But if you're ready for hormonal harmony, metabolic repair, and sustainable weight loss without drugs, it's a serious contender.

>> Lipovive was built for those who want the benefits of GLP-1 strategies, without the prescription, price tag, or pain.

Where to Buy Lipovive Without Getting Scammed (Amazon, Walmart, or Official Site?)

With the rising popularity of Lipovive, it's no surprise that imitation products and unauthorized resellers have started appearing across the internet, especially on platforms like Amazon, Walmart, and eBay. But here's the issue: none of these marketplaces are authorized to sell Lipovive, and buying from them may leave you with a bottle that's expired, reformulated, or outright counterfeit.

If you've seen Lipovive on Amazon, you're likely looking at a fake listing, or a third-party vendor reselling unsanctioned bottles with no quality guarantee and no refund eligibility. Here's why this matters:

  • Only the official site provides the full 60-day refund policy. Third-party sellers often refuse returns or vanish after a sale.

  • Only the official site guarantees batch integrity. Lipovive is a hormone-adjacent metabolic support formula with bioactive ingredients, improper storage or age compromises efficacy.

  • Only official orders are supported by the Lipovive support team in case of shipping issues or product questions.

The truth is, scam listings prey on the urgency and excitement around GLP-1 weight loss trends. They mimic legitimate branding and exploit keyword traffic, but deliver cheap knockoffs that don't work. And by the time users realize it, it's too late.

If you're going to evaluate Lipovive's potential, it makes no sense to test an expired or counterfeit version. Protect your trial, your refund access, and your results by using only the official Lipovive website. That's where current discounts (up to 73% off) are also available.

>> Bottom Line: The only way to get real Lipovive is through the official website. Anything else is a risk to your wallet, and your results.

Lipovive for Belly Fat, Blood Sugar & Appetite: Does It Deliver Where Diets Fail?

The real reason most diets fail isn't a lack of willpower, it's biology. You can eat clean, count calories, and still gain weight if your hunger signals are dysregulated and your insulin response is dysfunctional. That's exactly where Lipovive claims to deliver a breakthrough, targeting fat storage, blood sugar swings, and uncontrollable appetite at the hormonal level.

But can Lipovive actually burn belly fat, stabilize blood sugar, and shut down cravings? Let's break it down.

Lipovive and Visceral Fat Metabolism
The belly is often the first place fat accumulates, and the last to go. That's not just due to diet. It's tied to insulin resistance, cortisol buildup, and disrupted leptin signaling. Lipovive approaches this differently than stimulant-heavy fat burners. Instead of cranking metabolism with caffeine, Lipovive uses ingredients like Berberine and Green Tea Extract to improve fat utilization and suppress lipogenesis, the creation of new fat.

Blood Sugar and Craving Regulation
Lipovive's inclusion of Apple Cider Vinegar, Banaba Leaf, and Berberine creates a compound effect on post-meal glucose control and glycemic variability. This matters because blood sugar crashes often lead to hunger spikes, energy dips, and binge eating. Users report fewer midday crashes and a noticeable reduction in nighttime sugar cravings, especially after 2-3 weeks of consistent Lipovive use.

Appetite Suppression Without Stimulants
Unlike typical appetite suppressants that rely on jitters or caffeine, Lipovive works by supporting the release and sensitivity to natural satiety hormones like GLP-1. That means users often feel satisfied with smaller portions, and don't experience rebound hunger later.

Does Lipovive Replace Dieting?
No. But Lipovive creates a biological foundation where dietary changes are easier to sustain. That's why so many users say they "weren't even trying that hard" when the weight started shifting. When your metabolism isn't fighting you, results come faster.

Lipovive isn't a crash fix, it's a regulatory repair protocol for your body's fat metabolism and hunger instincts. Most users begin to feel a shift by week two. Less bloating. Less compulsion. More control.

Try Lipovive consistently for 60 days. You don't need to "diet harder." You just need a metabolic system that works with you, not against you.

Who Should Use Lipovive, And Who Probably Shouldn't

Not every supplement is right for every person. While Lipovive is designed to support natural hormone-driven weight loss, it's especially effective for those stuck in metabolic limbo, people who feel like their body has stopped responding to effort.

Ideal Candidates for Lipovive
If any of the following describe you, Lipovive is worth considering:

  • You're over 35 and feel like your metabolism has slowed despite clean eating

  • You struggle with stubborn belly fat that won't respond to diet or exercise

  • You crave sugar and carbs more than you used to

  • You feel hungry shortly after meals or late at night

  • You've tried calorie-counting or keto with no lasting success

  • You want a non-stimulant fat loss approach that doesn't wreck your sleep or nerves

Women in perimenopause and menopause are particularly responsive to the GLP-1 and GIP support offered by Lipovive. That's because these hormones decline with age, leaving many feeling powerless against weight gain, fatigue, and cravings.

Can Men Use Lipovive?
Yes, and many do. While Lipovive was designed with female hormonal shifts in mind, the underlying pathways it supports (GLP-1 signaling, insulin regulation, and appetite control) are just as relevant in men. In fact, men often report more rapid fat-loss responses in the first 30 days because of their baseline testosterone levels.

Who Should Avoid Lipovive?
Lipovive is not for:

  • Pregnant or breastfeeding women

  • Anyone taking GLP-1 agonist medications like Mounjaro, Ozempic, or Wegovy without doctor oversight

  • Individuals with severe gastrointestinal conditions aggravated by vinegar, ginger, or high-fiber extracts

  • Those expecting overnight transformation or stimulant-driven energy spikes

Lipovive isn't a magic fix. But it is a targeted metabolic protocol for people ready to work with their body, not fight it.

If you've hit a plateau, feel hormonally "off," or just want to see if your appetite, energy, and fat storage could be recalibrated, Lipovive offers a no-risk trial period backed by a full 60-day refund policy.

Lipovive vs Keto, Intermittent Fasting & Exercise: Complement or Replacement?

Let's be clear, Lipovive was never intended to replace healthy eating or movement. But if you've hit a wall despite sticking to Keto, IF (intermittent fasting), or high-output workouts, Lipovive might be what's missing from your metabolic strategy.

Here's how it stacks up:

Keto vs. Lipovive:
Keto's goal is to force your body into burning fat by removing carbs. But many people plateau, even in ketosis, because hunger hormones like GLP-1 are still out of sync. Lipovive doesn't require carb elimination. Instead, it works by enhancing your body's natural GLP-1 response, leading to appetite control, insulin regulation, and fat oxidation, without extreme dietary shifts.

Intermittent Fasting vs. Lipovive:
Fasting increases insulin sensitivity and encourages metabolic repair. But it's hard to stick with, especially when hunger signals remain intense. Lipovive makes fasting easier by mimicking satiety signals and reducing sugar cravings. Many users report that they naturally gravitate toward smaller eating windows after starting Lipovive, without strict planning.

Exercise vs. Lipovive:
Training boosts calorie burn, but it's only one part of the equation. Hormonal fat storage and insulin resistance can block fat loss even in active people. Lipovive helps unlock the stubborn fat reserves that won't budge with exercise alone, especially around the belly and thighs. It also supports recovery and blood sugar stability, so energy stays steady throughout the day.

So, Is Lipovive a replacement for lifestyle changes?
No. But it's one of the few supplements that actually enhances the biological systems behind those changes. It helps your body respond better to your efforts, which is why users often say they get more results with less restriction.

And if you've already tried everything and your results have stalled, what's the harm in trying Lipovive for 60 days? Especially when the refund is guaranteed, and the cost is a fraction of what people spend on keto meal plans or boutique training sessions.

Final Verdict: Is Lipovive Worth Trying or Just Another Trendy Formula?

The fat loss supplement space is crowded, and frankly, exhausting. Every few months, a new "breakthrough" hits the market, claiming to be the magic fix. So we understand the skepticism. Is Lipovive just another overhyped trend, or is there something real here?

Here's why Lipovive deserves a second look:

  • It doesn't rely on caffeine, water loss, or aggressive diuretics

  • It's not a repackaged keto pill pretending to burn fat in your sleep

  • It's not based on vague promises or celebrity marketing

Instead, Lipovive is built on the emerging science of natural GLP-1 and GIP hormone mimetics, a field gaining real traction thanks to clinical drugs like Mounjaro and Ozempic.

The ingredients in Lipovive aren't revolutionary individually, Berberine, Green Tea Extract, Apple Cider Vinegar, but it's the synergy and hormonal focus that sets it apart. Together, they support satiety signals, blood sugar control, metabolic efficiency, and fat oxidation, without pharmaceuticals.

More importantly, Lipovive offers a 60-day refund guarantee, not a 14-day trial with rebill traps or hidden clauses. That's not something scam brands do. That's the mark of a brand confident in their formulation and science.

So, is Lipovive worth trying?

If you're tired of second-guessing every carb…
If you've been burned by gimmicks and false hope…
If you've been waiting for a supplement that targets the real reason weight won't budge…

Then yes. Lipovive is worth trying.
The only thing you risk is not testing it for yourself.

>>Try Lipovive today, direct from the official website, backed by a full 60-day guarantee. Results don't happen in 3 days, but with Lipovive, you might finally stop working against your body, and start working with it.

Curious about other science-backed fat loss solutions for women over 35? data.title: Engie Confirms Guidance Despite Drop in Earnings
data.description:
By Adam Whittaker 




  French power utility Engie backed its full-year guidance despite a drop in earnings due to negative foreign exchange-rate changes and the disposal of assets. 



  The company said Friday that earnings before interest and taxes excluding nuclear power--a key company metric--fell 6.4% on an organic basis to 5.1 billion euros ($5.82 billion). 



  Engie said it recorded a nearly 100 million euro hit from negative exchange-rate changes, driven mainly by the depreciation of the Brazilian real. Earnings were also hit by the loss of income following the sale of stakes in assets in Morocco, Singapore and Pakistan. The earnings were however boosted by higher temperatures in France, the company said. 



  Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization were down 5.5% on an organic basis to 8.3 billion euros, while revenue rose 2.9% on an organic basis to 38.1 billion euros. 



  For 2025, the company continues to expect recurring net profit between 4.4 billion and 5 billion euros and EBIT excluding earnings from nuclear power between 8 billion and 9 billion euros. 





  Write to Adam Whittaker at adam.whittaker@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  August 01, 2025 02:49 ET (06:49 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Orosur Mining Inc Announces Sale of Stake in Company
data.description:
LONDON, GB / ACCESS Newswire / August 1, 2025 / Orosur Mining Inc. ("Orosur" or the "Company") (TSXV:OMI)(AIM:OMI), has been notified that Newmont Mining Corporation, who held a stake of approximately 9.4% in the Company, has sold this holding to several institutional long-term investors, at a price of C$0.19 per common share of Orosur. The sale of the stake is in keeping with Newmont's program of non-core divestments.

In its release of yesterday to the Toronto Stock Exchange, after market close, announcing the sale, Newmont also stated that "Newmont may, depending on price, market conditions or other conditions or factors it considers relevant from time to time, increase its beneficial ownership, control or direction over Common Shares or other securities of Orosur through market transactions, private agreements or otherwise".

Orosur Executive Chairman Louis Castro commented:

"Whilst we are sad to see Newmont go, we understand that the sale of the stake is part of Newmont's strategy of non-core disposals. Newmont has been a loyal and supportive partner to Orosur. We part on good terms and we welcome a number of strong and knowledgeable long-term investors as we push further into an exciting growth phase for the Company. Their investment is testament to the potential of the projects we are developing"

For further information, visitwww.orosur.ca, follow on X @orosurm or please contact

Neither TSX Venture Exchange nor its Regulation Services Provider (as that term is defined in policies of the TSX Venture Exchange) accepts responsibility for the adequacy or accuracy of this release.

About Orosur Mining Inc.

Orosur Mining Inc. (TSXV: OMI; AIM: OMI) is a minerals explorer and developer currently operating in Colombia, Argentina and Nigeria.

data.title: Faraday Future Kicks Off Trial Production Phase of its FX Super One MPV at its Hanford, CA Manufacturing Facility, Advancing Engineering and Safety Testing
data.description:
Faraday Future Kicks Off Trial Production Phase of its FX Super One MPV at its Hanford, CA Manufacturing Facility, Advancing Engineering and Safety Testing

Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI) (“Faraday Future”, “FF” or the “Company”), a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, today announced that its newly-unveiled First Class EAI-MPV model, the FX Super One, has commenced its trial production phase at its Hanford, CA factory.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250731217247/en/

Faraday Future Kicks Off Trial Production Phase of its FX Super One MPV at its Hanford, CA Manufacturing Facility, Advancing Engineering and Safety Testing.

The trial production phase is primarily focused on planning and verifying production processes, operational workflows, and quality standards. In parallel, engineers and production staff at the Hanford factory are undergoing specialized training to support production readiness.

Following this phase, the Company will proceed with comprehensive vehicle engineering of the vehicle, which includes extensive safety testing and validation. These efforts are integral to ensuring that the FX Super One meets the highest standards of quality, performance, safety, and the end user experience.

The FX Super One was unveiled on July 17 in Los Angeles and showcased the Super EAI F.A.C.E. (Front AI Communication Ecosystem) and the FF EAI Embodied AI Agent 6x4 Architecture. The vehicle is positioned as an EAI-MPV that aims to redefine the traditional mobility experience long dominated by models such as the Cadillac Escalade.

Faraday Future’s current 1.1 million-square-foot manufacturing and production facility in Hanford, California, named “FF ieFactory California,” has approximately $300 million invested so far in the multi-use facility, and with additional investment and permitting, could become capable of producing more than 30,000 vehicles annually.

The Company’s Hanford factory could prepare a flexible production line for FX units, including FF. The facility would support mixed-line manufacturing or assembly for multiple models.

The Company recently completed a new round of financing commitment totaling $105 million, which is expected to nearly cover the launch of the FX Super One.

ABOUT FARADAY FUTURE

Faraday Future is a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company. Founded in 2014, the Company’s mission is to disrupt the automotive industry by creating a user-centric, technology-first, and smart driving experience. Faraday Future’s flagship model, the FF 91, exemplifies its vision for luxury, innovation, and performance. The FX strategy aims to introduce mass production models equipped with state-of-the-art luxury technology similar to the FF 91, targeting a broader market with middle-to-low price range offerings. FF is committed to redefining mobility through AI innovation. Join us in shaping the future of intelligent transportation. For more information, please visit https://www.ff.com/us/.

FORWARD LOOKING STATEMENTS

This press release includes “forward looking statements” within the meaning of the safe harbor provisions of the United States Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. When used in this press release, the words “could,” “will,” “should,” and “future,” variations of these words or similar expressions (or the negative versions of such words or expressions) are intended to identify forward-looking statements. These forward-looking statements, which include statements regarding production capacity expansion, the FX brand, the Super One MPV, future FX models, future FX reservations, expansion into new states and markets, and production and sales goals, are not guarantees of future performance, conditions or results, and involve a number of known and unknown risks, uncertainties, assumptions and other important factors, many of which are outside the Company’s control, that could cause actual results or outcomes to differ materially from those discussed in the forward-looking statements.

Investors (English): ir@faradayfuture.com
Investors (Chinese): cn-ir@faradayfuture.com
Media: john.schilling@ff.com

View source version on businesswire.com: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250731217247/en/

data.title: First Mold to Showcase at Meximold 2025: Empowering North American Automotive Supply Chain with Cost-Effective Injection Solutions
data.description:
First Mold to Showcase at Meximold 2025: Empowering North American Automotive Supply Chain with Cost-Effective Injection Solutions

First Mold to Showcase at Meximold 2025: Empowering North American Automotive Supply Chain with Cost-Effective Injection Solutions

PR Newswire

ZHONGSHAN, China, July 31, 2025

ZHONGSHAN, China, July 31, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Precision mold and injection molding manufacturer First Mold announced recently, its participation in Meximold 2025 (Booth #905) at Mexico's Querétaro Exhibition Center this October. Following its appearances at North America's PTXPO and Mexico's Plastimagen earlier this year, this marks the third stop of First Mold's 2025 global strategy. Director of International Business Young Lee and Technical Director Michael Wang will lead the team on-site, delivering high-value injection molding solutions for clients in Mexico and surrounding regions.

Precision Positioning: Automotive Industry's Cost-Optimization Partner

With 40% of its annual output dedicated to automotive injection parts, First Mold excels in cost control. The exhibition will highlight its end-to-end capabilities for economical interior/exterior components, including mass-produced standardized products like door clips, air vents, and wire harness brackets. By leveraging standardized mold design, material utilization optimization, and Sino-U.S. collaborative production, First Mold helps clients reduce total procurement costs by 15%–20% while maintaining IATF 16949 quality standards.

Technical Director Michael Wang emphasized the core advantage:

"Many Latin American clients struggle to balance quality and cost. For a Chihuahua-based client, our optimized gate design for a wiper base component reduced defect rates from 0.3% to 0.08%, while modular mold structures cut mold-change time by 40%. These market-proven solutions will be demonstrated live at our booth."

Team Commitment: Affordable Rapid-Response Service

Director Young Lee highlighted localized support:

"Mexican clients prioritize not just competitive pricing but supply chain reliability. First Mold's 48-hour technical response network covers industrial hubs like Monterrey and Querétaro, offering end-to-end support—from drawing reviews to mass-production ramp-up. Last year, we delivered an emergency bumper bracket mold from contract signing to first-sample delivery in just 67 days—combining 'China Speed' with local support."

Lee noted that the USMCA-driven supply chain restructuring has spurred Tier-2 suppliers to seek stable, low-risk procurement alternatives. With over 1,000 automotive molds exported annually, First Mold's mature trans-Pacific logistics and customs solutions ensure controllable delivery cycles.

Early Bird Program: Tangible Cost Savings

To help clients lock in benefits, First Mold offers an exclusive pre-registration plan (by September 30, 2025) via:
https://firstmold.com/events/meximold-2025/
Dual benefits include:

  1. 5% discount on contracts signed during the exhibition.
  2. Priority DFM (Design for Manufacturing) analysis to preempt production risks.

Exhibition Value: Precision Platform for Growth Markets

Meximold—Mexico's largest professional mold exhibition—attracts procurement decision-makers focused on cost optimization. At the previous event, 78% of attendees were from automotive parts manufacturing, with a significant rise in small-to-mid-sized Tier-2 suppliers—First Mold's core client segment. The strategically located Booth #905 (main aisle) ensures efficient connections with results-driven partners.

About First Mold

Founded in 2011, First Mold specializes in R&D and manufacturing of cost-effective injection molding parts in automotive, aerospace, cosumer electronic industries, operating IATF 16949-certified facilities in China and the Mexico Core products include interior functional parts, exterior structural components, and electrical protection modules, serving Tier-2 suppliers to brands like General Motors, Volkswagen, and Tesla.

Business Contact:

Name: Young Lee
Position: Sales Manager
E-mail: sales@firstmold.com
Phone: +86 13925326660
Website: https://firstmold.com/

View original content:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/first-mold-to-showcase-at-meximold-2025-empowering-north-american-automotive-supply-chain-with-cost-effective-injection-solutions-302519441.html

SOURCE First Mold Manufacturing Limited
